title: World Football R
text: Analysis of European football leagues using the worldfootballR package. Data covers top 5 leagues — Premier League, Ligue 1, Bundesliga, Serie A, La Liga.

title: About
text:
Statistical programmer in the pharmaceutical industry. I work with R daily — CDISC standards, ADaM datasets, TLFs.
Outside of pharma, I apply R to sports analytics and finance.

Summary
Senior Statistical Programmer with 20+ years of expertise in clinical development. Proven track record as a Global Study Lead in Oncology (Phases I–III), delivering successful submission packages for FDA, EMA, and PMDA.
Currently bridging legacy SAS environments with modern Open Source — R/Pharmaverse and AI-driven automation — at Debiopharm.
